nodes.label: Patient Care Technician
nodes.search: patient care technician pct clinical nursing therapeutic bedside support. vitals, adls, turning, transport. the first paid clinical job most people get, and the one that proves whether the floor is for you. hs diploma + short pct/cna course none required (cna helps) weeks to months ~$33k

nodes.label: Medical Scribe
nodes.search: medical scribe scr clinical physician therapeutic you shadow the provider and chart in real time. cheap entry, huge exposure. the classic pre-med and pre-pa proving ground. hs diploma, often pre-health undergrad employer training weeks ~$32k

nodes.label: Certified Nursing Assistant
nodes.search: certified nursing assistant cna clinical nursing therapeutic the licensed-adjacent floor role. state registry, real scope, real accountability. most nurses started here. state-approved cna program state cna registry (competency exam) 4 to 12 weeks ~$36k

nodes.label: Licensed Practical / Vocational Nurse
nodes.search: licensed practical / vocational nurse lpn/lvn clinical nursing therapeutic first real nursing license. about a year of school, then meds, wound care, and skilled tasks under an rn or provider. a fast on-ramp, and a common bridge to rn. ~12 month practical nursing diploma nclex-pn state lpn/lvn license ~$60k

nodes.label: Registered Nurse
nodes.search: registered nurse rn clinical nursing therapeutic the backbone of the system. adn or bsn, then nclex-rn. from here the fan is enormous: any specialty, any setting, and the on-ramp to advanced practice, informatics, and leadership. adn (2 yr) or bsn (4 yr) nclex-rn state rn license ~$86k

nodes.label: BSN-Prepared RN
nodes.search: bsn-prepared rn bsn clinical nursing therapeutic the bachelor's that unlocks the next tier. required for most graduate nursing, magnet hospitals, and the leadership track. bachelor of science in nursing rn license +1 to 2 yr from adn ~$90k

nodes.label: ICU / Critical Care RN
nodes.search: icu / critical care rn icu rn clinical nursing therapeutic high-acuity, high-autonomy. the classic feeder for crna and acute-care advanced practice. ccrn (optional, valued) med-surg or direct icu start ~$95k

nodes.label: Emergency RN
nodes.search: emergency rn er rn clinical nursing therapeutic triage, trauma, undifferentiated chaos. broad skills, fast decisions, a strong base for fnp/enp and charge work. cen (optional) tncc, acls, pals ~$92k

nodes.label: Perioperative / OR RN
nodes.search: perioperative / or rn or rn clinical nursing therapeutic the sterile field, circulating and scrubbing. specialized, well-compensated, and a path into surgical services leadership. cnor (optional) periop 101 or or fellowship ~$93k

nodes.label: Nurse Practitioner
nodes.search: nurse practitioner np clinical nursing therapeutic advanced practice. diagnose, treat, prescribe. population focus sets the lane: family, acute care, psych, peds. in many states, fully independent. msn or dnp national board cert (aanp/ancc) state aprn license + dea ~$126k

nodes.label: Clinical Nurse Specialist
nodes.search: clinical nurse specialist cns clinical nursing therapeutic advanced practice aimed at systems, not just patients. drives evidence-based practice, quality, and staff competency across a specialty. msn or dnp (cns track) cns board certification state aprn license ~$120k

nodes.label: Nurse Anesthetist
nodes.search: nurse anesthetist crna clinical nursing therapeutic the top of the nursing pay scale. administers anesthesia across the or, ob, and pain. now a doctoral entry requirement and brutally competitive. doctoral (dnp/dnap) anesthesia program nbcrna national certification ~1+ yr icu experience ~$210k

nodes.label: Certified Nurse Midwife
nodes.search: certified nurse midwife cnm clinical nursing therapeutic full-scope women's health and birth. prenatal, delivery, and primary care across the lifespan. msn/dnp midwifery amcb certification state aprn license ~$120k

nodes.label: Nurse Educator
nodes.search: nurse educator edu clinical nursing therapeutic teaches the next wave, in academia or hospital staff development. where clinical mastery turns into multiplied capacity. msn (education focus) cne (optional) ~$84k

nodes.label: Charge Nurse
nodes.search: charge nurse chg clinical nursing therapeutic first taste of leadership. runs the shift, assigns the board, owns the unit's flow when it breaks. the proving ground for management. bsn often preferred 2+ yr on the unit ~$95k

nodes.label: Nurse Manager
nodes.search: nurse manager mgr clinical nursing therapeutic owns a unit. budget, staffing, quality, the people. the point where the job stops being clinical and starts being operational. bsn required, msn/mha valued cnml (optional) ~$100k

nodes.label: Nursing Director
nodes.search: nursing director dir clinical nursing therapeutic multiple units or a service line. strategy, not staffing sheets. the bench for the cno chair. msn or mha nea-bc (optional) ~$130k

nodes.label: Chief Nursing Officer
nodes.search: chief nursing officer cno clinical nursing therapeutic the top nursing seat. owns nursing practice, quality, and the largest workforce in the building. c-suite. msn + mba/mha common, dnp rising nea-bc ~$200k+

nodes.label: Nursing Informaticist
nodes.search: nursing informaticist ni bridge informatics informatics where nursing meets the ehr. translates clinical workflow into build, and build back into workflow. a clean crossover from the bedside into technology. bsn + informatics certificate/msn-ni rn-bc informatics (optional) ~$100k

nodes.label: Certified Respiratory Therapist
nodes.search: certified respiratory therapist crt clinical respiratory therapeutic entry into respiratory care. associate degree, then the nbrc exam at the entry threshold. vents, airways, abgs, codes. where this whole brand's founder started. coarc-accredited associate degree nbrc tmc (entry cut score) state rt license ~$62k

nodes.label: Registered Respiratory Therapist
nodes.search: registered respiratory therapist rrt clinical respiratory therapeutic the advanced rt credential. higher tmc cut plus the clinical simulation exam. the standard for icu-level practice and the gateway to specialty and leadership. coarc associate or bachelor's nbrc tmc (high cut) + cse state rt license ~$72k

nodes.label: Adult Critical Care Specialist
nodes.search: adult critical care specialist rrt-accs clinical respiratory therapeutic specialty credential for adult critical care. deep vent, hemodynamics, and the sickest patients in the building. the peak of bedside rt mastery. rrt + critical care practice nbrc accs specialty exam ~$80k

nodes.label: Neonatal / Pediatric Specialist
nodes.search: neonatal / pediatric specialist rrt-nps clinical respiratory therapeutic specialty credential for the nicu and picu. the most fragile airways and the smallest margins for error. rrt + nicu/picu practice nbrc nps specialty exam ~$80k

nodes.label: Sleep Disorders Specialist
nodes.search: sleep disorders specialist rrt-sds clinical respiratory therapeutic diagnostic sleep medicine. studies, titrations, and the long game of chronic respiratory disease. nbrc sds specialty exam sleep lab / outpatient ~$72k

nodes.label: Pulmonary Function Technologist
nodes.search: pulmonary function technologist rpft clinical respiratory therapeutic the diagnostics bench. pfts, methacholine challenges, the data behind every pulmonary diagnosis. nbrc cpft then rpft pft lab ~$72k

nodes.label: RT Lead / Supervisor
nodes.search: rt lead / supervisor rt lead clinical respiratory therapeutic runs the shift for the department. staffing, escalation, the bridge between the floor and management. rrt, bachelor's valued senior bedside + specialty ~$85k

nodes.label: Respiratory Manager
nodes.search: respiratory manager rt mgr clinical respiratory therapeutic owns the respiratory department. budget, staffing, quality, and the equipment fleet. bachelor's, mha/mba valued rt lead + admin ~$100k

nodes.label: Cardiopulmonary Director
nodes.search: cardiopulmonary director cp dir clinical respiratory therapeutic directs respiratory plus cardiac diagnostics and sometimes sleep and rehab. a multi-department service line. mha / mba multi-department service line ~$130k

nodes.label: Radiologic Technologist
nodes.search: radiologic technologist rt(r) clinical imaging diagnostic x-ray and the foundation of medical imaging. arrt-registered, then a launchpad into every advanced modality. associate in radiography (jrcert) arrt (r) state license (most states) ~$66k

nodes.label: CT Technologist
nodes.search: ct technologist ct clinical imaging diagnostic cross-sectional imaging, often in the thick of trauma and the ed. a high-throughput, high-skill modality. arrt (ct) post-primary rt(r) ~$72k

nodes.label: MRI Technologist
nodes.search: mri technologist mri clinical imaging diagnostic magnetic resonance. long studies, deep physics, and the strictest safety zone in the hospital. arrt (mr) post-primary rt(r) or other ~$78k

nodes.label: Mammography Technologist
nodes.search: mammography technologist mamm clinical imaging diagnostic breast imaging under tight mqsa regulation. precision and patient rapport in equal measure. arrt (m) post-primary mqsa ~$74k

nodes.label: Nuclear Medicine Technologist
nodes.search: nuclear medicine technologist nmt clinical imaging diagnostic radiopharmaceuticals and functional imaging. pet, spect, and the molecular side of diagnosis. arrt (n) or nmtcb often dedicated nuc med program ~$92k

nodes.label: Diagnostic Sonographer
nodes.search: diagnostic sonographer rdms clinical imaging diagnostic ultrasound across ob, abdominal, vascular, and echo. hands-on, operator-dependent, and in high demand. ardms (rdms / rvt) or arrt (s) sonography program ~$84k

nodes.label: Interventional / Cardiovascular Tech
nodes.search: interventional / cardiovascular tech ir/cv clinical imaging diagnostic the cath lab and ir suite. procedural imaging where the table is also the operating field. arrt (vi) / (ci) or rcis cath lab / ir ~$82k

nodes.label: Imaging Lead
nodes.search: imaging lead img lead clinical imaging diagnostic runs the modality or the shift. the senior tech who owns protocols, quality, and the people on the schedule. registry + bachelor's valued senior modality tech ~$85k

nodes.label: Imaging Manager
nodes.search: imaging manager img mgr clinical imaging diagnostic owns the imaging department. budget, staffing, equipment, and the throughput that keeps the ed and clinics moving. bachelor's, mha valued imaging lead + admin ~$100k

nodes.label: Imaging Director
nodes.search: imaging director img dir clinical imaging diagnostic directs imaging across the system. strategy, capital planning, and the radiology service line. mha / mba system imaging service line ~$135k

nodes.label: PACS / Imaging Informatics
nodes.search: pacs / imaging informatics pacs bridge informatics informatics owns the imaging archive, the worklists, and the integration between modalities and the ehr. a tech's crossover into informatics. ciip (optional) imaging tech + it ~$95k

nodes.label: Pre-Med / Undergrad
nodes.search: pre-med / undergrad pre clinical physician therapeutic the long road's first mile. science prereqs, the mcat, clinical hours. high cost, high commitment, highest ceiling. bachelor's + premed prereqs mcat 4 yr n/a

nodes.label: Physician Assistant
nodes.search: physician assistant pa-c clinical physician therapeutic master's-level advanced practice. diagnose, treat, prescribe, assist in surgery. broad lateral mobility across specialties. master's pa program nccpa pance state pa license ~$130k

nodes.label: Medical Student
nodes.search: medical student ms clinical physician therapeutic md or do. two years of basic science, two of clinical rotations, and the first board exams that start sorting specialty. md or do program (4 yr) usmle / comlex step 1-2 n/a (debt)

nodes.label: Resident Physician
nodes.search: resident physician res clinical physician therapeutic paid, supervised training in a chosen specialty. three to seven years of long hours and steep responsibility. 3 to 7 yr by specialty final licensing step ~$65k

nodes.label: Fellow (Subspecialty)
nodes.search: fellow (subspecialty) fel clinical physician therapeutic optional subspecialty training after residency. cardiology, critical care, oncology, and the rest of the deep end. 1 to 3 yr subspecialty boards ~$75k

nodes.label: Attending Physician
nodes.search: attending physician md/do clinical physician therapeutic the fully independent physician. owns the medical decision and the team. the clinical authority everything else orbits. board certification unrestricted state license + dea $230k to $500k+

nodes.label: Chief Medical Officer
nodes.search: chief medical officer cmo clinical physician therapeutic the physician executive. owns medical staff, quality, and clinical strategy at the system level. md/do + mba/mha common physician leadership track ~$350k+

nodes.label: Patient Access / Registration
nodes.search: patient access / registration par operational revenue informatics the front door of the revenue cycle. registration, insurance verification, and the first data that every downstream bill depends on. hs diploma + on-the-job chaa (optional) weeks ~$38k

nodes.label: Health Info Clerk
nodes.search: health info clerk him operational revenue informatics owns the record. release of information, chart integrity, and the rules of who sees what. the on-ramp to credentialed him. hs diploma + him coursework none to start ~$40k

nodes.label: Medical Biller
nodes.search: medical biller bill operational revenue informatics turns care into claims. submission, denials, appeals, the back-and-forth with payers that funds the building. hs diploma + billing course cpb (optional) ~$46k

nodes.label: Medical Coder
nodes.search: medical coder cpc/ccs operational revenue informatics translates the chart into icd-10 and cpt. accuracy here drives reimbursement, compliance, and the data the whole system runs on. coding program cpc (aapc) or ccs (ahima) ~$58k

nodes.label: RHIT (Health Info Technician)
nodes.search: rhit (health info technician) rhit operational revenue informatics ahima-credentialed him technician. data quality, coding oversight, and record systems at the associate level. associate in him (cahiim) ahima rhit ~$55k

nodes.label: RHIA (Health Info Administrator)
nodes.search: rhia (health info administrator) rhia operational revenue informatics bachelor's-level him leadership. owns information governance, privacy, and the data backbone, with a clean line into informatics. bachelor's in him (cahiim) ahima rhia ~$75k

nodes.label: Revenue Cycle Analyst
nodes.search: revenue cycle analyst rcm operational revenue informatics finds the leaks. denials trends, charge capture, payer behavior, and the dashboards that tell finance where the money is going. bachelor's common sql / excel / ehr billing ~$70k

nodes.label: Revenue Cycle Manager
nodes.search: revenue cycle manager rcm mgr operational revenue informatics owns a slice of the revenue cycle. teams, kpis, and the constant fight against denials and aging ar. bachelor's, mha valued analyst + supervision ~$95k

nodes.label: Revenue Cycle Director
nodes.search: revenue cycle director rcm dir operational revenue informatics owns the full revenue cycle end to end. the financial engine room of the organization. mha / mba common front to back revenue cycle ~$135k

nodes.label: HIM Director
nodes.search: him director him dir operational revenue informatics directs health information across the system. governance, compliance, coding integrity, and the record as an asset. rhia + graduate degree system him ~$120k

nodes.label: Department Coordinator
nodes.search: department coordinator coord operational admin admin keeps a unit or clinic running. scheduling, supplies, the thousand small things. the administrative on-ramp. hs diploma, some college none entry ~$42k

nodes.label: Operations Supervisor
nodes.search: operations supervisor sup operational admin admin first-line operational leadership. owns a team's day-to-day, scheduling, and workflow. associate / bachelor's path coordinator + lead ~$58k

nodes.label: Practice / Clinic Manager
nodes.search: practice / clinic manager pm operational admin admin runs a clinic or practice. staffing, billing flow, patient experience, and provider relations under one roof. bachelor's common cmpe / cmm (optional) ~$78k

nodes.label: Department Administrator
nodes.search: department administrator admin operational admin admin where the mha usually lands. owns a department or program's budget, strategy, and people. the graduate-degree inflection point. mha / mba department / program ~$100k

nodes.label: Service Line Director
nodes.search: service line director sl dir operational admin admin owns a clinical service line as a business: cardiac, ortho, oncology. growth, margin, and outcomes together. mha / mba service line p&l ~$140k

nodes.label: Quality / PI Analyst
nodes.search: quality / pi analyst qa operational quality admin process improvement and patient safety by the numbers. lean, six sigma, and the metrics that regulators and boards watch. bachelor's, clinical background helps cphq / lean (optional) ~$72k

nodes.label: Quality Manager
nodes.search: quality manager q mgr operational quality admin owns quality, safety, and accreditation for a unit or system. the bridge between frontline care and the board's risk tolerance. bachelor's / graduate cphq ~$95k

nodes.label: Clinical Informatics Analyst
nodes.search: clinical informatics analyst cia bridge informatics informatics the crossover. clinicians who learned the build, and it people who learned the clinic. owns ehr configuration, workflow optimization, and the data layer. this is where a bedside career becomes a technology one. clinical or it background + ehr certs epic / cerner certifications ~$90k

nodes.label: Senior Clinical Informatics Analyst
nodes.search: senior clinical informatics analyst sr cia bridge informatics informatics owns complex builds and cross-team projects. the senior technical voice that clinical leadership leans on. where this brand's founder sits today. often a master's (mha / informatics) multiple ehr certifications ~$110k

nodes.label: Clinical Informatics Manager
nodes.search: clinical informatics manager ci mgr bridge informatics informatics leads the informatics team and the ehr roadmap. the seat where technology strategy and clinical operations finally report to the same person. master's informatics team + roadmap ~$135k

nodes.label: Chief Medical Information Officer
nodes.search: chief medical information officer cmio bridge informatics informatics the physician who owns clinical technology. bridges the medical staff and it at the executive table. md/do + informatics clinical informatics board cert ~$300k+

nodes.label: Chief Nursing Information Officer
nodes.search: chief nursing information officer cnio bridge informatics informatics the nurse who owns clinical technology. represents the largest user base of the ehr at the executive level. msn + informatics rn-bc informatics ~$220k+

nodes.label: VP of Operations
nodes.search: vp of operations vp operational admin admin senior operations leadership across multiple service lines or facilities. the last step before the c-suite. mha / mba multi-facility / multi-line ~$200k+

nodes.label: Chief Operating Officer
nodes.search: chief operating officer coo operational admin admin runs the operation. everything that has to work every day, every shift, reports up to this chair. mha / mba vp-level enterprise ops ~$300k+

nodes.label: Chief Executive Officer
nodes.search: chief executive officer ceo operational admin admin the top of the chart. owns the mission, the strategy, the board relationship, and the whole organization's results. mha / mba, sometimes clinical doctorate c-suite track record $500k to several million

nodes.label: Home Health Aide
nodes.search: home health aide hha operational support support care in the home. personal care, mobility, the eyes on a patient between visits. a low-barrier entry that feeds straight into the licensed tracks. short training program state hha / agency cert ~$33k

nodes.label: Patient Transport
nodes.search: patient transport trans operational support support moves patients safely through the building. often the first hospital badge, and a window into every department. hs diploma + on-the-job bls ~$33k

nodes.label: Medical Interpreter
nodes.search: medical interpreter interp operational support support bridges language at the bedside. accuracy here is a patient-safety job, not a convenience. interpreter training + language fluency cmi / chi (national) ~$52k

nodes.label: Patient Navigator
nodes.search: patient navigator nav operational support support walks patients through a system built to confuse them. appointments, referrals, barriers, follow-through. the human glue of care coordination. bachelor common (or experience) navigator certificate (optional) ~$52k

nodes.label: Case Manager
nodes.search: case manager case operational support support owns the complex patient across settings. discharge planning, utilization, the handoffs that keep people out of the ed. often an rn or social worker. rn or msw background acm / ccm ~$85k

nodes.label: Registered Dietitian
nodes.search: registered dietitian rdn operational support support the clinical nutrition authority. tube feeds, tpn, the metabolic side of recovery. now a graduate-degree credential. master's + supervised practice rdn (cdr) ~$66k

nodes.label: Phlebotomist
nodes.search: phlebotomist phleb clinical lab diagnostic draws the blood the whole diagnostic engine runs on. short to credential, and a common first step into the lab. phlebotomy program (weeks-months) cpt (nha / ascp) ~$40k

nodes.label: Laboratory Assistant
nodes.search: laboratory assistant lab ast operational lab biotech specimen processing and the bench basics. the ground floor of laboratory science. hs + lab training mla (ascp) optional ~$40k

nodes.label: Medical Lab Technician
nodes.search: medical lab technician mlt operational lab biotech runs the analyzers and the routine testing. associate-level laboratory science under a scientist or pathologist. associate in mlt (naacls) mlt (ascp) ~$57k

nodes.label: Medical Lab Scientist
nodes.search: medical lab scientist mls operational lab biotech the bachelor-level lab scientist. complex testing, qc, the science behind the result. backbone of the diagnostic lab. bachelor in mls (naacls) mls (ascp) ~$68k

nodes.label: Histo- technologist
nodes.search: histo- technologist htl operational lab biotech prepares tissue for the pathologist. the slides cancer diagnoses are read from. histotechnology program ht / htl (ascp) ~$62k

nodes.label: Laboratory Manager
nodes.search: laboratory manager lab mgr operational lab biotech owns the lab operation. throughput, accreditation (clia/cap), instruments, and the scientists running them. mls + bachelor/graduate dlm (ascp) optional ~$100k

nodes.label: Research Assistant
nodes.search: research assistant ra operational research biotech the bench of clinical and translational research. protocols, data, and the early work that becomes tomorrow’s standard of care. bachelor in science gcp / crc (optional) ~$48k

nodes.label: Research / Pharma Scientist
nodes.search: research / pharma scientist sci operational research biotech doctoral-level science. drug development, translational research, the discovery end of healthcare. phd or pharmd territory. phd / pharmd academia, pharma, biotech ~$110k+

nodes.label: Pharmacy Technician
nodes.search: pharmacy technician pht clinical pharmacy therapeutic fills, compounds, and manages the medication supply under a pharmacist. a short credential and a real foothold in the med-use system. hs + pharmacy tech program cpht (ptcb) ~$40k

nodes.label: Pharmacist
nodes.search: pharmacist pharmd clinical pharmacy therapeutic the medication expert. verifies, counsels, and owns drug safety. a doctoral clinician in retail, hospital, or specialty practice. doctor of pharmacy (pharmd) naplex + state license ~$130k

nodes.label: Clinical Pharmacist
nodes.search: clinical pharmacist rxclin clinical pharmacy therapeutic embedded on the care team. rounds, dosing, anticoagulation, antimicrobial stewardship. residency-trained pharmacy at the bedside. pharmd + residency (pgy1/2) bps board certification ~$145k

nodes.label: Pharmacy Director
nodes.search: pharmacy director rxdir clinical pharmacy therapeutic runs the pharmacy department. formulary, budget, 340b, and medication safety across the system. pharmd + ms/mba common department + budget ~$170k

nodes.label: Emergency Medical Technician
nodes.search: emergency medical technician emt clinical ems therapeutic the first responder. basic life support, the rig, the worst moments of someone’s day. a fast credential and a true proving ground. emt certificate course nremt ~$38k

nodes.label: Advanced EMT
nodes.search: advanced emt aemt clinical ems therapeutic emt-plus. ivs, more meds, a wider scope on the truck. the middle rung between emt and paramedic. aemt course nremt-advanced ~$44k

nodes.label: Paramedic
nodes.search: paramedic emt-p clinical ems therapeutic the top of prehospital care. advanced airway, cardiac, drugs, and judgment with no doctor in the room. often an associate degree. paramedic program (often as) nremt-paramedic ~$52k

nodes.label: Flight / Critical Care Paramedic
nodes.search: flight / critical care paramedic fp-c clinical ems therapeutic critical care in a helicopter. the sickest transports, the highest skill bar in ems. paramedic + critical care fp-c / ccp-c ~$70k

nodes.label: EMS Supervisor / Captain
nodes.search: ems supervisor / captain ems sup clinical ems therapeutic runs the shift and the crews. dispatch, protocols, the field leadership of an ems agency. paramedic + leadership senior field medic ~$68k

nodes.label: EMS Director
nodes.search: ems director ems dir clinical ems therapeutic directs the ems agency or service line. medical direction, budget, fleet, and regional coordination. bachelor's + ems leadership agency / service line ~$95k

nodes.label: PT / Rehab Aide
nodes.search: pt / rehab aide pt aide clinical rehab therapeutic sets up the gym, supports treatment, learns the field. the ground floor of rehabilitation. hs + on-the-job none to start ~$33k

nodes.label: Physical Therapist Assistant
nodes.search: physical therapist assistant pta clinical rehab therapeutic delivers pt treatment under a physical therapist. associate-level, hands-on, in demand. associate (capte) npte-pta + state license ~$64k

nodes.label: Physical Therapist
nodes.search: physical therapist dpt clinical rehab therapeutic doctoral movement specialist. evaluates, diagnoses, and owns the rehab plan. direct access in most states. doctor of physical therapy npte + state license ~$98k

nodes.label: Occupational Therapy Assistant
nodes.search: occupational therapy assistant ota clinical rehab therapeutic delivers ot interventions under an occupational therapist. helps people do the activities that make a life. associate (acote) cota (nbcot) ~$63k

nodes.label: Occupational Therapist
nodes.search: occupational therapist ot clinical rehab therapeutic restores function and independence. adls, cognition, adaptation. a doctoral or master’s clinician. otd or mot otr (nbcot) ~$93k

nodes.label: Speech-Language Pathologist
nodes.search: speech-language pathologist slp clinical rehab therapeutic communication and swallowing. stroke, peds, head and neck. a master’s clinician with broad autonomy. master's in slp ccc-slp (asha) ~$89k

nodes.label: Athletic Trainer
nodes.search: athletic trainer atc clinical rehab therapeutic prevention, assessment, and rehab of injury. the sideline clinician, also in clinics and industry. master's (caate) atc (boc) ~$58k

nodes.label: Audiologist
nodes.search: audiologist aud clinical rehab therapeutic hearing and balance. diagnostics, amplification, cochlear implants. a doctoral clinician. doctor of audiology (aud) state license + ccc-a/aba ~$87k

nodes.label: Rehab Services Director
nodes.search: rehab services director rehab dir clinical rehab therapeutic directs pt, ot, slp, and rehab across the system. outcomes, productivity, and the therapy service line. clinical doctorate + mba/mha therapy service line ~$120k

nodes.label: Behavioral Health Technician
nodes.search: behavioral health technician bht clinical behavioral therapeutic frontline support on a psych or treatment unit. safety, milieu, and the human presence that holds a unit together. hs + training, some college cbht (optional) ~$37k

nodes.label: Substance Use Counselor
nodes.search: substance use counselor cadc clinical behavioral therapeutic addiction treatment and recovery. counseling, groups, the long road back. credential-based, often lived experience. cert to bachelor’s path cadc / ladc ~$48k

nodes.label: Licensed Counselor
nodes.search: licensed counselor lpc clinical behavioral therapeutic psychotherapy in private practice or clinic. anxiety, depression, trauma. a master’s-level independent clinician. master's in counseling lpc / lmhc ~$60k

nodes.label: Clinical Social Worker
nodes.search: clinical social worker lcsw clinical behavioral therapeutic therapy plus the system. mental health treatment, resources, and advocacy. the most versatile behavioral license. msw lcsw ~$62k

nodes.label: Behavior Analyst
nodes.search: behavior analyst bcba clinical behavioral therapeutic applied behavior analysis, largely in autism and developmental care. assessment, programming, and supervision. master's + aba coursework bcba ~$75k

nodes.label: Psychologist
nodes.search: psychologist phd/psyd clinical behavioral therapeutic doctoral mental health. assessment, testing, therapy, and research. the clinical authority in behavioral health. phd or psyd eppp + state license ~$105k

nodes.label: Behavioral Health Director
nodes.search: behavioral health director bh dir clinical behavioral therapeutic directs behavioral health services. programs, compliance, crisis systems, and the workforce that runs them. clinical license + graduate degree bh service line ~$115k

nodes.label: Dental Assistant
nodes.search: dental assistant da clinical dental therapeutic chairside support. sterilization, radiographs, patient prep. the on-ramp to dental careers. dental assisting program cda (danb) ~$44k

nodes.label: Dental Hygienist
nodes.search: dental hygienist rdh clinical dental therapeutic preventive dental care. cleanings, perio, patient education. strong autonomy and pay for an associate degree. associate in dental hygiene rdh (nbdhe + state) ~$82k

nodes.label: Dentist
nodes.search: dentist dds/dmd clinical dental therapeutic the doctoral oral health clinician. diagnoses, treats, and runs the practice. often a small-business owner too. dds or dmd board + state license ~$160k

nodes.label: Sterile Processing Technician
nodes.search: sterile processing technician spd clinical surgical therapeutic owns the instruments. decontamination, sterilization, and the trays every surgery depends on. invisible until it fails. spd training program crcst (hspa) ~$42k

nodes.label: Surgical Technologist
nodes.search: surgical technologist cst clinical surgical therapeutic scrubs in. sterile field, instruments, anticipating the surgeon’s next move. the or’s right hand. surgical tech program cst (nbstsa) ~$56k

nodes.label: Surgical First Assistant
nodes.search: surgical first assistant sfa clinical surgical therapeutic hands in the field. retraction, suturing, hemostasis. the step beyond scrubbing. first assistant program csfa / cfa ~$72k

nodes.label: Medical Assistant
nodes.search: medical assistant cma clinical allied therapeutic the clinic’s utility player. rooming, vitals, injections, and the front-to-back of an outpatient visit. ma program (often ~1 yr) cma / rma ~$42k

nodes.label: Telemetry / Monitor Tech
nodes.search: telemetry / monitor tech monitor clinical allied therapeutic watches the rhythms. reads telemetry, catches the arrhythmia, calls the nurse. eyes that don’t blink. ekg / telemetry course cmt / crat ~$40k

nodes.label: Doula
nodes.search: doula doula clinical allied therapeutic continuous support through birth. not clinical, deeply care. a growing, evidence-backed role in maternal outcomes. doula training + certification cd (dona, etc.) ~$variable

nodes.label: Lactation Consultant
nodes.search: lactation consultant ibclc clinical allied therapeutic the feeding expert. clinical lactation support for new families. often built on a nursing or allied base. clinical background + lactation hours ibclc ~$70k

nodes.label: EKG / Cardiographic Technician
nodes.search: ekg / cardiographic technician ekg clinical cardiovascular diagnostic runs the 12-lead and stress tests. the first read on the heart. a short on-ramp to cardiovascular careers. ekg tech course cet / crat ~$42k

nodes.label: Cardiovascular Technologist
nodes.search: cardiovascular technologist cvt clinical cardiovascular diagnostic invasive and noninvasive cardiac diagnostics. cath lab, vascular, and the data behind cardiology. associate in cv technology rcis / rcs ~$66k

nodes.label: Echocardiographer
nodes.search: echocardiographer rdcs clinical cardiovascular diagnostic ultrasound of the heart. structure, function, the images cardiology lives on. cardiac sonography program rdcs (ardms) / rcs ~$80k

nodes.label: Electrophysiology Technologist
nodes.search: electrophysiology technologist ep clinical cardiovascular diagnostic the rhythm lab. ablations, device implants, mapping. high-skill cardiac procedural work. cv tech base + ep training rces ~$85k

nodes.label: EEG / Neuro- diagnostic Tech
nodes.search: eeg / neuro- diagnostic tech eeg clinical neurodiagnostic diagnostic records the brain. eeg, evoked potentials, intraoperative monitoring. the signal behind neurology. neurodiagnostic program r. eeg t. (abret) ~$60k

nodes.label: Polysomnographic Technologist
nodes.search: polysomnographic technologist rpsgt clinical neurodiagnostic diagnostic runs the sleep study. scores the stages, titrates the pressure. the diagnostic side of sleep medicine. polysomnography program rpsgt (brpt) ~$58k

nodes.label: Ophthalmic Technician
nodes.search: ophthalmic technician ophth clinical imaging diagnostic eyes and imaging. vision testing, oct, fields, and the workup before the ophthalmologist. ophthalmic tech program / ojt cot (jcahpo) ~$46k

nodes.label: Pathologists’ Assistant
nodes.search: pathologists’ assistant patha clinical lab diagnostic gross dissection and autopsy support under a pathologist. the bridge between the or specimen and the diagnosis. master's (naacls patha) pa (ascp) ~$110k

nodes.label: Community Health Worker
nodes.search: community health worker chw operational social support the trusted neighbor inside the system. outreach, education, and closing the gap between clinic and community. chw training program state chw cert (varies) ~$45k

nodes.label: Medical Social Worker
nodes.search: medical social worker msw operational social support the system’s problem-solver. resources, discharge, crisis, and the social side of being sick. master’s-level. master of social work lmsw / lcsw ~$62k

nodes.label: Health Coach
nodes.search: health coach coach operational social support behavior change, one conversation at a time. chronic disease, prevention, the daily habits that move outcomes. coaching program / health background nbc-hwc ~$50k

nodes.label: Peer Support Specialist
nodes.search: peer support specialist peer operational social support lived experience as credential. walks alongside people in recovery and serious illness. the role that proves you made it through. peer specialist training state peer certification ~$38k

nodes.label: Chaplain / Spiritual Care
nodes.search: chaplain / spiritual care chap operational spiritual support the presence at the hardest moments. spiritual care, ethics, and family support across every faith and none. graduate divinity + cpe board certification (bcc) ~$60k

nodes.label: Unit Secretary / HUC
nodes.search: unit secretary / huc huc operational support support runs the desk that runs the unit. orders, charts, phones, and the flow of a busy floor. a classic way in. hs + on-the-job chuc (optional) ~$36k

nodes.label: Public Health Aide / Worker
nodes.search: public health aide / worker ph aide business publichealth government boots on the ground for a health department. outreach, screenings, data collection, the work that keeps a population healthy before it ever sees a clinic. hs + public health training chw cert (varies) ~$40k

nodes.label: Public Health Analyst
nodes.search: public health analyst ph anl business publichealth government turns population data into action. surveillance, grants, program evaluation. the analytical engine of a health department. bachelor's (public health / data) state / county health dept ~$62k

nodes.label: Epidemiologist
nodes.search: epidemiologist epi business publichealth government the disease detective. tracks outbreaks, models risk, and writes the evidence policy is supposed to follow. an mph minimum, often doctoral. mph (often phd/drph) health dept, cdc, academia ~$81k

nodes.label: Public Health Program Manager
nodes.search: public health program manager ph mgr business publichealth government runs a public health program. budget, staff, grants, and the metrics a funder and a board both watch. mph / mha program + budget ~$85k

nodes.label: Public Health Director
nodes.search: public health director ph dir business publichealth government runs a county or regional health department. communicable disease, emergencies, the public’s health is the job description. mph/mha (sometimes md) department / jurisdiction ~$120k

nodes.label: Health Commissioner
nodes.search: health commissioner comm business publichealth government the top public health official for a state or large jurisdiction. often a physician. where medicine, policy, and politics collide. md/do + mph common state / large jurisdiction ~$180k+

nodes.label: Health Facility Surveyor
nodes.search: health facility surveyor surv business regulatory government the state inspector. walks hospitals and nursing homes against the regulations, writes the deficiencies, and holds the license. usually a clinician who crossed over. clinical license + surveyor training state survey agency / cms ~$72k

nodes.label: Health Policy Analyst
nodes.search: health policy analyst policy business policy government reads the bills, runs the numbers, writes the brief. translates clinical reality into language a legislator can vote on. where advocacy meets evidence. mph / mpp / mha agency, legislature, think tank ~$70k

nodes.label: Health Policy Advisor
nodes.search: health policy advisor advisor business policy government in the room where it happens. advises legislators or executives on health policy, shapes legislation, and carries the clinician’s voice into the statute. graduate degree legislature / executive office ~$100k

nodes.label: Simulation Educator
nodes.search: simulation educator sim business clinicaled education runs the sim lab. mannequins, scenarios, and debriefs that let students fail safely before they ever touch a patient. clinical license + education chse (optional) ~$72k

nodes.label: Clinical Instructor
nodes.search: clinical instructor clin inst business clinicaled education takes students onto the floor. bridges the classroom and the bedside, and signs off that a new clinician is safe to practice. master's + clinical expertise college + clinical site ~$78k

nodes.label: Adjunct Faculty
nodes.search: adjunct faculty adjunct business faculty education a practitioner who teaches on the side. brings the real job into the classroom, course by course. the most common way clinicians enter academia. master's or doctorate college / university ~$variable / per course

nodes.label: Instructor / Lecturer
nodes.search: instructor / lecturer instr business faculty education full-time teaching faculty without the research mandate. owns courses and students, the backbone of a teaching program. master's (doctorate preferred) college / university ~$66k

nodes.label: Assistant Professor
nodes.search: assistant professor asst prof business faculty education the tenure-track start. teaching, research, and service, with the clock running toward tenure. a doctorate required. phd / clinical doctorate university ~$85k

nodes.label: Associate Professor
nodes.search: associate professor assoc business faculty education tenured. established scholar, mentor, and program leader. the middle of a long academic career. doctorate + tenure university ~$98k

nodes.label: Professor
nodes.search: professor prof business faculty education the top of the academic ladder. national reputation, big grants, the scholars who train the trainers. doctorate, full professor university ~$130k+

nodes.label: Program Director
nodes.search: program director prog dir business faculty education runs an academic program, a nursing school, an rt program, an allied health track. accreditation, curriculum, outcomes, and the students’ futures. graduate / doctoral academic program ~$100k

nodes.label: Dean of Health Sciences
nodes.search: dean of health sciences dean business faculty education the academic executive. runs a college of health sciences, faculty, budget, strategy, and the pipeline that feeds the whole workforce. doctorate college / school ~$160k+

nodes.label: Healthy / Well
nodes.search: healthy / well well well no active disease. the patient meets the system through prevention, screening, and the occasional minor issue. the cheapest, healthiest, and most under-served state. primary care / none normal screenings, no chronic dx low (prevention)

nodes.label: At Risk

nodes.label: Acute Illness / Injury

nodes.label: Chronic Condition
nodes.search: chronic condition chron chronic a diagnosis that doesn't leave. diabetes, copd, heart failure, hypertension. the state most of healthcare spending lives in, managed over years, not visits. primary + specialty care persistent diagnosis, ongoing meds high and continuous

nodes.label: Recovery / Rehab
nodes.search: recovery / rehab rehab recovery healing back toward baseline. rehab, follow-up, the work of returning. the branch that points back up the tree, when the system supports it. rehab, home health, outpatient improving function moderate, time-limited

nodes.label: Complex / Multi-Morbid
nodes.search: complex / multi-morbid cmplx complex multiple chronic conditions stacking and interacting. the 5% of patients driving most of the cost. care coordination becomes the whole game. multi-specialty + care management several interacting diagnoses very high

nodes.label: Critical / Decompensated

nodes.label: Pregnant (Prenatal)
